title: Assistant Technical Manager (Construction/ Building)
description:
Our esteemed client in the Construction industry is seeking an Assistant Technical Project Manager to join their dynamic team:

  • Employment Type: Permanent
  • Position: Assistant Technical Manager
  • Location: Yio Chu Kang
  • Working Hours: 5.5 days, Office Hours
  • Salary Package: Basic + Bonus

Job Responsibilities:

  • To oversee the design, integration, and commissioning of advanced controlled environments.
  • Review and approve design specifications, equipment selections, and technical submittals.
  • Manage risks and ensure constructability in design decisions for critical systems.
  • Plan and manage commissioning activities, including protocols, schedules, and system startup.
  • Supervise installation, functional testing, and verification of systems related to controlled environments.
  • Troubleshoot technical issues during commissioning, working closely with construction and QA/QC teams.
  • Document commissioning results, prepare as-built records, and oversee final project turnover packages.
  • Interface with clients, contractors, and internal stakeholders to align design and commissioning strategies with project goals.
  • Lead system handover, including performance validation and client sign-off.
  • Provide technical support to construction and procurement teams, including engineering clarifications.
  • Ensure compliance with international standards and regulations for controlled environments.
  • Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams including mechanical, electrical, architectural, and process engineers.

Job Requirements:

  • At least Degree in Mechanical Engineering or a related discipline
  • Minimum 5 years of experience in technically complex or regulated industries (e.g., advanced manufacturing, life sciences, or energy sectors).
  • Familiar with cleanroom standards, HVAC systems, commissioning best practices, and contamination control
  • Proficient in AutoCAD, Revit, Navisworks would be a plus.


Ready to apply? Here’s how:

  • Click the APPLY button, or
  • Email your resume (in MS Word or PDF format) to adelin@intuitrecruitment.com. Include the job title in your email subject line for prompt processing.

Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.


By submitting your application, you consent to the collection and use of your personal data under Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).
